sql_example.query: SELECT TOP 100 TM.TM_GRSNO, TM.TM_DATE, TM.TM_RSTP, TM.TM_SUBJ, TM.TM_PSID, TM.TM_NAME, TD.TD_SUBJ, TD.TD_PATH FROM mnda.dbo.DCS3_TRST_MST TM LEFT JOIN mnda.dbo.DCS3_TRST_DAT TD ON TM.TM_SNO = TD.TD_SNO WHERE TM.TM_PSID = :login_user AND (TM.TM_GRSNO LIKE :q OR TM.TM_SUBJ LIKE :q) ORDER BY TM.TM_DATE DESC

params.login_user: 登入者帳號或身分證號
